title: T5 Watchtower: Live agent view — df-worker liveness + pane tails + AngelEye probe
prompt: Give the Watchtower web app (~/dev/ad/apps/watchtower, AppyStack scaffold — real-app ruling Q6) its 'what are the agents doing right now' surface. Ship a read-only GET /api/agents route that composes python3 engine/status.py --json --n-audit 200 (the authoritative store aggregator — never read the store from Node), per-worker tmux capture-pane tails (capture only, never send-keys), and a 1500ms-timeout AngelEye availability probe (http://127.0.0.1:5051 — dark at authoring; revival is T6-04, probe-and-degrade only). Classify each df-worker-* as working (live tmux session + running/ ticket attributed via audit_tail), idle (live, no ticket), or stale (running ticket whose worker session is gone), with an unattributed_running lane for audit misses. Add an Agents client view polling every 5s: HALT/BACKOFF banners, worker cards (state chip, ticket title, short session id, 15-line pane tail), 'AngelEye dark — revival is T6-04' badge, and a 'Factory cold' empty state (the common state between engine runs). Prove it live with a throwaway 'tmux new-session -d -s df-worker-9' sleep session that must appear, show its pane tail, and be killed and verified gone (leftover df-worker sessions block the engine's warm pool). No writes to engine/store/, no engine/*.py edits, no new npm dependencies, nothing spawns claude. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T5-03-live-agent-view.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: With the Watchtower dev server up (per Fork F3), curl http://127.0.0.1:5061/api/agents returns the apiSuccess envelope whose data keys are exactly angeleye/factory/generated_at/unattributed_running/workers, with factory.queue_depth and factory.running_count matching a fresh python3 engine/status.py --json run. Live round trip: a temporary df-worker-9 tmux sleep session appears within one poll as state 'idle' with 'WG-T5-03-PANE-PROOF' in its pane_tail, then disappears after kill-session, and 'tmux ls | grep -c df-worker' ends at 0. Fork-dependent: AngelEye dark (expected) gives angeleye.available == false with the T6-04 badge wired in the client; alive gives available == true and a session-feed extension note in results. Quality gates npm run lint, typecheck, test, build all exit 0 in ~/dev/ad/apps/watchtower and the feat(agents) commit is pushed. Negative: zero 'send-keys' occurrences under watchtower/server/src, git status in dark-factory clean apart from any needs-decision park files, engine/status.py still runs clean, scaffold /health and /api/info still answer, and client/package.json gained no dependencies.
